pos-terminal.name: QuickJuan POS Terminal
pos-terminal.description: Comprehensive point of sale solution for restaurants and retail businesses.

capabilities.title: Flexible Payments
capabilities.desc: Accept cash, card, QR, and e-wallets with ease.

capabilities.title: Inventory Management
capabilities.desc: Track stock in real time and get low-inventory alerts.

capabilities.title: Sales Analytics
capabilities.desc: Visualize sales trends and make data-driven decisions.

capabilities.title: Customer Database
capabilities.desc: Build loyalty with customer profiles and purchase history.

capabilities.title: Fast Checkout
capabilities.desc: Speedy transactions keep lines moving and customers happy.

capabilities.title: Smart Notifications
capabilities.desc: Get notified for important events and low stock.

capabilities.title: Digital Receipts
capabilities.desc: Send receipts via SMS or email instantly.

capabilities.title: Cloud Access
capabilities.desc: Manage your business from anywhere, anytime.

capabilities.title: Integrations
capabilities.desc: Connect with accounting, delivery, and more.
